message:
refactor: simplify Lua API crate module imports via extern crate aliases

Replace direct frankenterm-dynamic dependency with extern crate alias
(wezterm_dynamic as frankenterm_dynamic) in mux-lua and window-funcs.
Proc macros from frankenterm-dynamic-derive expand to frankenterm_dynamic::
paths, but the crate is imported as wezterm_dynamic — the alias resolves
this mismatch without needing it as an explicit Cargo dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,4 @@ termwiz-funcs.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
 url-funcs.workspace = true
 wezterm-dynamic.workspace = true
-# Proc macros from frankenterm-dynamic-derive expand to `frankenterm_dynamic::`,
-# so we need the actual package name available too.
-frankenterm-dynamic.workspace = true
 wezterm-term.workspace = true

@@ -11,5 +11,4 @@ anyhow.workspace = true
 config.workspace = true
 luahelper.workspace = true
 wezterm-dynamic.workspace = true
-frankenterm-dynamic.workspace = true
 window.workspace = true
